subject: New Opening: Software Engineer – Python
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to share an exciting opportunity that just came in from VitalisIT, a company in the healthcare space.

They are scaling their engineering team and are looking for a Software Engineer to join on a contract basis.

What they're looking for:
• Python
• Azure
• MongoDB

Practical details:
• Start: 2020-12-16
• Duration: 6 months
• Location: Stockholm (on-site)
• Rate: up to 950 SEK/h

If this sounds like a fit, or you know someone who might be – reach out!

Best regards,
Viktor Olsson
Tech Recruitment Lead
ByteForce
Tel: +46 76 677 89 01
